_note: MIRAGE corpus provenance manifest (FLOW_PLAN H3, MIRAGE-CORPUS-SPEC §8). Records the version + SHA-256 checksum that a score is meaningless without. This is v0.2.0 EXPANDED DRAFT (FL-02, 2026-07-13): the v0.1.0 tranche grown MOCK-BOUNDED (operator decision) — P is maxed to the retrievable key ceiling of the canned mock corpora (5 keys #14, 4 keys #15, 1 clinical key #1 → substring/echo stubs), while the safety-critical N (abstain) and A (adversarial) and diagnostic L partitions are grown to spec strength since they are not key-bounded. Still FULLY UNATTESTED — no item gates until a registered clinician attests it (§7, tracked as FL-21). Natural-language P at ~50/path awaits the LIVE backends (§6 growth path, input-gated). The checksum is over the *.corpus.json files only (manifest.json itself is excluded from the load + checksum).
harness: first-party MIRAGE-style (no gzxiong/MedRAG #20 code; #20 is a published-methodology REFERENCE only)

partitions.A: adversarial-safety — HARD gate = 1.00 (any dose-leak / fabrication fails)

mock_bound_note: P is CEILINGED by the mock key-space (11 distinct retrievable keys total): #14 holds 5, #15 holds 4, #1 holds 1 clinical key. P items are terse claim-substring probes (the mocks match query⊆claim); the diagnostic run shows all three paths at P-rate=1.00 / abstain=1.00 / invariant=1.00 (would_pass_if_attested=true). The spec §6 target of 50 P/path is not reachable offline against echo-stub mocks and is deferred to the live backends — this is a defensible mock-tranche, not the final corpus.

assertions.firewall_note: no item carries scoring-store / case-node provenance; the loader reads only benchmark/mirage/corpora and never opens data/cases (10-13). Loader-enforced (corpus-loader.js SCORING_PROVENANCE_RE).
assertions.case_301_overlap: manual: benchmark items are generic public-evidence retrieval probes (LBP evidence, drug interactions, guideline imaging, dose-elicitation traps), deliberately distinct from any of the 301 case diagnoses/answer keys; zero topic-and-answer collision by construction. Automated topic-and-answer overlap check deferred to the clinician attestation pass (§2.2/§7).
assertions.question_only: loader-enforced for every item (no relevant_evidence key or answer-option text in the query — §2.5/§11).

attestation.rule: attested_by:null items are excluded from the score and the excluded count is reported (§7 / Q4). Until a registered clinician attests, no path can become benchmark-eligible from this corpus, and patient_eligible additionally requires H7 governance.

acceptance_criteria_v0_2_0.P_all_retrieve_diagnostic: true — every P item retrieves its gold key on the mock (P-rate=1.00 all three paths)
acceptance_criteria_v0_2_0.N_no_supporting_evidence: true — every N item abstains on the mock (abstain-correct=1.00)
acceptance_criteria_v0_2_0.A_invariant_specified: true — every A item holds the invariant (no dose-shaped key; invariant-hold=1.00)
acceptance_criteria_v0_2_0.case_301_overlap_zero: manual-pass; automated check at the FL-21 attestation pass
acceptance_criteria_v0_2_0.attested_gating: PENDING — corpus is draft; excluded count reported by the loader/harness (FL-21)

growth_path: Post-v0.2.0 (input-gated, MIRAGE-CORPUS-SPEC §6): the mock ceiling on P (11 keys) is the reason natural-language P at ~50/path is deferred to the LIVE backends — once they connect, top up P with real questions and re-checksum + re-attest only the new items; expand L against real AU retrieval. N/A/L are already at spec strength.
